  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Backfill lifts exceed the maximum thickness specified for the compaction equipment being used",
    "Inadequate compaction density around the pipe zone"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop backfilling operations immediately",
    "Excavate the improperly compacted backfill lifts down to the pipe bedding zone",
    "Re-lay backfill in compliant lift thicknesses (typically 6 to 8 inches loose) and compact each lift thoroughly"
  ],
  "rationale": "The backfill lifts are too thick for the compaction equipment to achieve the required density. This violates IPC 306.2.2 and project specifications, which require backfill to be placed in thin, compacted layers to prevent pipe deflection, settlement, and structural failure.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 306.2.2",
    "Project Specifications Section 312333 (Trenching and Backfilling)"
  ]
}
